summary: Israeli warplanes struck Yaroun in southern Lebanon, heavily damaging the historic Saint George Church. Iran launched missiles from Jam missile city in Bushehr Province and a ballistic missile toward Kuwait, which was intercepted by Kuwaiti defenses. U.S. forces continue a naval blockade of Iran with over 20 warships while Iranian naval units warned off four unauthorized vessels near the Strait of Hormuz.
key_points: Israeli warplanes struck the southern Lebanese town of Yaroun, heavily damaging the historic Saint George Church (Source: @presstv/191848).
Iran launched a missile from Jam missile city in Bushehr Province at 19:40 Zulu (Source: @shin_persian/6287).
Iran fired a ballistic missile toward Kuwait, which was intercepted by Kuwaiti forces (Source: @VahidOnline/75772).
Iranian naval forces warned four unauthorized vessels near the Strait of Hormuz and explosions were reported in Bandar Abbas and Hormozgan (Source: @VahidOnline/75781).
U.S. Central Command reported more than 20 American warships enforcing a blockade against Iran, including an amphibious assault ship (Source: @Faytuks_Network/3136).
Israeli air alerts were activated in the Mishgav Ha'em area and Marageliyut, with investigations ongoing (Source: @idf_telegram/23949).
A video showed the building targeted where Ali al‑Husni, head of the IRGC‑backed Imam Hussein Division missile forces, was hit by Israeli Air Force (Source: @shin_persian/6280).

sections.executive_summary: Israeli warplanes struck Yaroun in southern Lebanon, heavily damaging Saint George Church. Iran launched missiles from Jam city and a ballistic missile toward Kuwait, which was intercepted. U.S. naval forces maintain a blockade of Iran with over 20 warships.

points: Iran launched a missile from Jam missile city in Bushehr Province at 19:40 Zulu, as reported by a local source (Source: @shin_persian/6287).
A ballistic missile was fired toward Kuwait and was successfully intercepted by Kuwaiti defenses, which labeled the act a serious violation of sovereignty (Source: @VahidOnline/75772).

Iranian naval forces issued warning shots to four unauthorized vessels attempting to transit the Strait of Hormuz, with simultaneous reports of explosions in Bandar Abbas and Hormozgan provinces (Source: @VahidOnline/75781).
Iranian state media falsely claimed downing a U.S. aircraft near Bushehr, which was later denied by U.S. Central Command confirming all assets are accounted for (Source: @shin_persian/6291).
Israeli warplanes struck the southern Lebanese town of Yaroun, causing heavy damage to the historic Saint George Church (Source: @presstv/191848).
The Israel Defense Forces issued alerts in the Mishgav Ha'em area and Marageliyut, investigating a suspected aerial threat (Source: @idf_telegram/23949).

A targeted building where Ali al‑Husni, head of the IRGC‑backed Imam Hussein Division missile forces, was located was hit by the Israeli Air Force, as shown in a released video (Source: @shin_persian/6280).
Israeli and Shin Bet forces eliminated a senior Hamas operative, deputy commander of the Gaza City Brigade, in a precise strike in northern Gaza (Source: @idf_telegram/23952).
Israeli and Shin Bet forces carried out a precise strike in northern Gaza, killing Hamas deputy commander of the Gaza City Brigade, Amad Hasan Aslam (Source: @idf_telegram/23952).
No additional operational details about West Bank incidents were present in the source messages.
Israeli warplanes struck Yaroun in southern Lebanon, heavily damaging Saint George Church (Source: @presstv/191848).
New_security8200 reported multiple Israeli Air Force strikes on targets in the village of Yochmor, southern Lebanon (Source: @New_security8200/200177).
A geolocated tweet indicated damage to a mid‑rise building in Beirut, Lebanon, claimed as a targeted assassination (Source: @shin_persian/6282).
Redlinkleb posted a live map of airstrikes over Deir Qanun al‑Nahr in southern Lebanon (Source: @redlinkleb/18095).
No explicit operational reports concerning Syria or Iraq were found in the provided messages.
Kuwait intercepted an Iranian ballistic missile aimed at its territory, condemning the attack as a violation of sovereignty (Source: @VahidOnline/75772).
Iranian naval forces warned four unauthorized vessels near the Strait of Hormuz, with explosions reported in nearby Iranian provinces (Source: @VahidOnline/75781).
U.S. Central Command noted that more than 20 American warships are enforcing a blockade against Iran, including an amphibious assault ship (Source: @Faytuks_Network/3136).

key_developments: Israeli warplanes struck Yaroun in southern Lebanon, heavily damaging the historic Saint George Church (Source: @presstv/191848).
Iran launched a missile from Jam missile city in Bushehr Province at 19:40 Zulu (Source: @shin_persian/6287).
A ballistic missile fired by Iran toward Kuwait was intercepted by Kuwaiti defenses, which labeled the act a serious violation of sovereignty (Source: @VahidOnline/75772).
Iranian naval forces warned four unauthorized vessels near the Strait of Hormuz and explosions were reported in Bandar Abbas and Hormozgan (Source: @VahidOnline/75781).
U.S. forces maintain a naval blockade of Iran with more than 20 warships, including an amphibious assault ship (Source: @Faytuks_Network/3136).
Israeli air alerts were activated in the Mishgav Ha'em area and Marageliyut, with investigations into a suspected aerial threat (Source: @idf_telegram/23949).
A video showed the building targeted where Ali al‑Husni, head of the IRGC‑backed Imam Hussein Division missile forces, was hit by the Israeli Air Force (Source: @shin_persian/6280).
sections.threat_assessment: Iran continues to project power through missile launches from Bushehr and ballistic attempts toward Kuwait, while also asserting naval control in the Strait of Hormuz, indicating a multi‑domain threat to regional security. Israeli air operations in Lebanon and Gaza demonstrate sustained offensive capability, targeting both militant leadership and infrastructure. The U.S. naval presence enforces a blockade, adding a deterrent but also raising the risk of escalation with Iranian forces.
sections.regional_response: Kuwait publicly condemned the intercepted missile and called for an immediate halt to Iranian attacks, while Iran denied responsibility for the alleged downing of a U.S. aircraft. Lebanese authorities reported multiple Israeli strikes, suggesting heightened tension along the southern border. International actors, including France, are monitoring civilian impacts in Gaza, reflecting broader diplomatic concern.
sections.intelligence_notes: Monitoring of Iranian missile trajectories from Jam city and ballistic launches toward Gulf states should be intensified, with particular focus on interception capabilities in Kuwait and Saudi air defenses. Israeli targeting of IRGC‑linked missile command structures may indicate a shift toward degrading Iran's regional proxy networks. Continued Israeli air alerts in northern Israel suggest potential cross‑border incursions from Lebanon, requiring vigilance from ground and air units.
